productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Block Island Grey Shoe
description: If you're tireless when it comes to preserving our environment but also love the casual comfort of a slip-on shoe, Earthkeepers Venetian is the shoe for you. Though the shoe is crafted from rugged, full-grain leather to uphold high quality standatds, timberland has also chosen their materials carefully to ensure that the Venetian is 90% recyclable.Upper Designed for disassembly so 90% of its parts can be reused or recycled Premium full-grain leather from an LWG Silver-rated tannery for comfort and durability Unlined uppers make this a great warmer-weather shoe Slip-on style for easy on and off Stitched detailing for added structure Midsole RemovableAnti-fatigue footbed provides all-day comfort and support Outsole Siped rubber outsole for slip resistance and traction Green Rubber outsole made from 42% recycled rubber Shoe careUse the appropriate timberland leahter polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas of the shoe
